title: Pilot-extract ≥3 landmark open-access ES outcome studies (double-extracted)
context: Before scaling extraction, the schema, ontology, compliance gates, and CI must be proven on real data. This task pilot-extracts at least three landmark open-access ES outcome studies, double-extracted with adjudication, to validate the end-to-end pipeline. The specific landmark studies are selected from the M1 included-studies register, not pre-enumerated here. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Harmonize ≥3 landmark open-access ES outcome studies into schema-valid records, double-extracted with logged adjudication, all passing CI gates and signed by a domain reviewer.
acceptanceCriteria: ≥3 landmark open-access studies harmonized; every record cites DOI/PMID + source table/figure + license.
Each record double-extracted; discrepancies adjudicated and logged.
100% of records pass all CI gates; domain reviewer signs the pilot.
output: /output/datasets/pilot/ pilot extraction records (schema-valid) plus an adjudication log, committed to the repo.
